exemplar.title: Can new knowledge change established values or beliefs?

detailedExemplarData.title: Can new knowledge change established values or beliefs?

strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with authentic historical contexts
Consistent links made between each object and the IA prompt, with justification and supporting references
Effective title and labelling that frame the exhibition and prepare the reader
Compelling contextualisation of Picassoâs Guernica showing its impact on pacifist values
Broad reference list demonstrating engagement with multiple source types
weaknesses: Key claims lack nuance and critical analysis (e.g., âscientifically disprovedâ Genesis)
Repetitive phrasing and occasional generic language reduce TOK depth
Proofreading errors and truncation interrupt the coherence of the final reflection
Limited engagement with alternative perspectives and knowledge questions
Insufficient methodological detail and provenance information for some objects
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission clearly meets the descriptors for the 5â6 band by identifying three well-contextualised objects, sustaining coherent links to the IA prompt, and offering justified contributions supported by evidence. Strengths include strong contextual framing and consistent referencing. However, the work falls short of the precision, depth and critical engagement required for a 7â8 band. Assertions are sometimes over-definitive, TOK analysis lacks exploration of alternative perspectives and methodological scrutiny, and there are lapses in coherence and proofreading. These factors justify awarding a top mark in the 5â6 band (6/10).

annotations.comment: This summary repeats earlier content; consider introducing new TOK insights rather than restating prior analysis.
Cite the specific archaeological or museum report that dates the fetter to reinforce the reliability of the claim.
The title effectively frames the exhibition, integrating art, history and science to address the IA prompt.
Explicit statement of the IA prompt anchors the analysis well; consider adding a brief roadmap of the three objects in the introduction.
Clear labelling of Object 1 establishes focus and prepares the reader for the subsequent analysis.
Provide provenance details (e.g., current location, acquisition history) in the caption to strengthen contextual credibility.
The historical context (Viking Age, c. 800 CE) is well-presented and situates the object convincingly.
Interpretive statements such as âundoubtedly usedâ are asserted without critical evaluation; consider assessing the museumâs evidential basis.

Engage with alternative perspectives (e.g.
peaceful aspects of eastern trade) to deepen the link to the IA prompt.
The claim âtheir success â¦ would not have happened if not for their trade in slavesâ is overly absolute; add nuance and qualification.

Introduce an explicit knowledge question (e.g.
âTo what extent does new evidence reshape our moral judgments of historical actors?â) for TOK depth.
This concluding statement repeats earlier points; consider synthesizing the insight within the preceding analysis.
Integrate this summarizing insight into the main section for a more cohesive structure.
The introduction of Darwinâs second edition is well placed, providing clear continuity from the first object.
Ensure that the citation style in the caption follows a consistent academic format, particularly for URLs.
The typo âDrawinâ undermines credibility; proofread to ensure accuracy of key names.
Discuss specific alterations in the second edition to justify why this version was chosen for the exhibition.
The phrase âscientifically disprovedâ is too definitive; Darwinâs theory challenged but did not empirically falsify religious narratives.
Explore how religious institutions responded to Darwin to present multiple perspectives on new knowledge.
The link to rising atheism is asserted without data; integrate quantitative evidence to support this causal claim.
Cite specific studies or statistics on religious affiliation shifts to strengthen the justification.
Expand discussion on how Darwinâs methodological approach transformed practices of knowledge production.
The object label clearly identifies Picassoâs Guernica and situates it temporally.
Specify medium, dimensions and current location of Guernica to enhance the objectâs contextual depth.
The description of the bombing context is compelling and situates the paintingâs creation forcefully.
Incorporate Picassoâs own commentary on Guernica to connect artist intent to changes in collective values.
Strong link between Guernica and evolving pacifist values demonstrates clear connection to the IA prompt.
Explain how the reproduction and exhibition of Guernica facilitated its global impact to deepen TOK analysis.
The claim about challenging traditional aesthetic norms is insightful but lacks specific critical responses to illustrate the shift.
Include case studies of criticsâ reactions or landmark exhibitions to substantiate the claim on art-world standards.
The final paragraph is truncated, interrupting the argument; ensure full text is included and proofread.
This opening on the final page reads disjointedly; integrate it more seamlessly with the previous pageâs conclusion.
Consolidate fragmented sentences into a coherent final reflection that synthesizes all three objects.
The reference list demonstrates breadth, including museums, articles, and academic sources.
Prioritize peer-reviewed journals or primary historical documents to increase academic rigor.
Verify that all in-text citation numbers correspond accurately to the bibliography entries.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
